_publications._publicationTitle: NF1-Specific Growth Charts for Head Circumference Over the First 3 Years of Life.

_contextSnippet: Using 137 SWYC assessments obtained on the same day as head circumference measurements across 52 NF1 patients
resourceName: Survey of Well-being of Young Children (SWYC)
details: 137 SWYC assessments were used to evaluate developmental delay, showing relationship with head circumference benchmarked against NF1 growth charts
